title: Hardcore Death Ban
description: A Datapack That Bans A Players When They Die, Like In Hardcore Mode.
body:
**How To Use:**

First, **Download** This Datapack Using The Button On The Top Right Of The Screen.

Then, Go To The _**server.properties**_ File In Your Server (This Datapack Doesn't Work On Singleplayer), And Replace The **function-permission-level** Value With **4**. This Is To Allow The Datapack To Ban Players.
![instr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/203d30b10dbe474abc1504ad1350b33c810dcd3d.png)

Now, Add The Datapack To Your Server.

Operators Can **Unban Player** Who Have Been Banned.
